posts.name: Cursor for iOS
posts.tagline: Build with coding agents from anywhere
posts.description: Cursor is now available as a native iOS app in public beta, so you can build from anywhere. Until now, developers have worked around the limits of their local machines, keeping laptops half-open and caffeinated everywhere they go. With Cursor for iOS, you can launch always-on agents in the cloud, or control agents running on your computer from your phone. Kick them off when ideas strike, get notified when work is ready for review, and merge PRs on the go.

makers.name: Jeff Hurray
makers.headline: Building iOS apps @Ramp - ex Lyft, Yahoo

posts.name: Skills Marketplace by Databox
posts.tagline: Ready-made AI analytics skills for your business data
posts.description: A library of ready-made skills for paid ads, website performance, ecommerce, revenue, and more. Each skill pulls from your live performance data and returns a finished, shareable report in under a minute. Run them in Claude when you want answers in chat, or schedule them in n8n to land in Slack or email automatically. Free to download.

posts.name: Foresight by Lightning Rod
posts.tagline: Predict anything with AI
posts.description: Foresight by Lightning Rod is an OpenAI-compatible forecasting API for developers building agents, prediction-market bots, and decision tools. Ask a question about a future event and get a scored, calibrated forecast back. Unlike general-purpose LLMs, Foresight is trained and evaluated on real-world outcomes, with benchmark-verified accuracy, cheaper inference, and a drop-in API for forecasting workflows.

posts.name: Akiflow
posts.tagline: Manage tasks and calendars from Claude, ChatGPT or Cursor
posts.description: Akiflow is a digital planner and calendar for centralising tasks, unifying schedules, and optimising productivity., built for busy professionals! Experience the world's #1 Time Blocking app.

posts.name: Supafax
posts.tagline: Email-native assistant that learns how you work
posts.description: Supafax is an email-native assistant that learns how you work and prioritizes your inbox, drafts replies, and schedules meetings end-to-end.

posts.name: v0 Design Systems 2.0
posts.tagline: Build with your components, colors, fonts, and patterns
posts.description: v0 Design Systems 2.0 is here. You can now import your system from the sources your team already uses: GitHub repos, public and private npm packages, Storybook and docs, Figma frames, screenshots, ZIPs, and real apps. v0 learns how your design system is actually used and creates a playground with your components and tokens. Preview the result, keep iterating in chat, and save it when it's ready.

posts.name: Pluno
posts.tagline: Browser agent that’s 10x faster than Claude
posts.description: Pluno just killed Claude in the browser. Claude clicks around the UI like a drunk intern - instead, Pluno talks directly to the API to act 10x faster, with 10x fewer tokens. Learns new tools instantly and uses every web app like a pro. Tested and outperformed Claude in 500+ web apps. Claude clicks - Pluno gets it done. Launch day: get $50 in free credits.

posts.name: Dayflow
posts.tagline: Open source tools that help you get promoted
posts.description: Getting promoted isn't just about doing great work - it's about remembering and proving it. Can you remember what you accomplished 23 weeks ago? Dayflow is a local-first macOS app that uses your screen data and AI to automatically journal your workday. No timers, no manual logging. Every bug fixed, doc written, and problem solved is captured - ready for standups, 1:1s, and performance reviews. Run any model (local or cloud), keep everything on your Mac. Open source, MIT licensed.

posts.name: AgentPeek
posts.tagline: Claude Code & Codex in your Mac notch
posts.description: You're running more coding agents than ever, but you can't keep up with them. That's where AgentPeek comes in. It pulls every session up into your Mac notch, live. Glance up, approve a prompt, watch token usage and manage the entire flow without pausing your YouTube video. All local, all yours.

posts.name: Tinkerfont
posts.tagline: Free font playground for live websites
posts.description: Tinkerfont is a free Chrome Extension and Firefox Add-on for designers, developers, and tinkerers who want to experiment with fonts on real websites -- without opening DevTools, touching the design system, or editing a stylesheet.

posts.name: Brain2Qwerty v2
posts.tagline: Decode sentences directly from non-invasive brain signals
posts.description: Brain2Qwerty v2 is a non-invasive brain-computer interface from Meta that decodes raw MEG brain signals into text. Using end-to-end deep learning and LLMs, it reaches up to 78% word accuracy without surgery.

posts.name: Load Nova
posts.tagline: An AI co-pilot and dashboard built for dispatcher speed
posts.description: One workspace for dispatchers. Less tab switching. Smarter freight. Load Nova is a Chrome side panel and Dashboard that lives next to your load board. Parse broker emails, calculate real RPM & profit, plan routes with live weather — end-to-end in under 3 minutes. No tab switching. Key features: Unified dispatch dashboard AI-assisted load planning Driver and load management Route & HOS awareness Email and workflow automation Real-time operational insights Work inside ChatGPT

posts.name: Justwrite
posts.tagline: A private, local-first writing space that works offline
posts.description: Justwrite is a distraction-free notes app for fast, private writing. No login, no cloud dependency, autosave, offline support, focus mode, markdown shortcuts, exports, and ambient writing modes.

posts.name: Oakamo
posts.tagline: Your quiet space for reading articles later.
posts.description: The web is full of great content, but reading later often means distractions, ads, and endless tabs. I built Oakamo to make reading enjoyable again. Save articles from anywhere, organize them in your personal library, read in a clean distraction-free reader, highlight important passages, and listen on the go. Oakamo is built for people who love reading and want a calmer, more thoughtful way to enjoy the web.

posts.name: Clade
posts.tagline: AI COO that runs your team in tools you already use
posts.description: Clade is your AI COO for teams. It lives in Telegram, Slack, and iMessage, so there's no new dashboard to babysit - you message it like a teammate. Clade chases status updates, keeps client and project work moving, drafts the follow-ups, and flags what's slipping before it becomes a fire. The web app is your cockpit when you want the full picture. Built for teams who'd rather ship than manage.

posts.name: Bilt.me - Figma
posts.tagline: Get a real mobile app from your Figma design
posts.description: You designed the whole thing in Figma. Then you had to hire someone to rebuild it by hand, pixel by pixel, and it came out "close enough." Not anymore. Drop your Figma frames into Bilt and they become a real app for iPhone. Your spacing, your fonts, your colors, exactly. You even own the code.

posts.name: DropK
posts.tagline: The tray that doesn't pretend
posts.description: Text, files, images, folders - all in a single drop zone you drag into and pull out of naturally. It's the landing spot for "the messy middle of Mac work." and it can still keep tracking your clipboard. When on a project, clear your slate, work through everything, and DropK will have all related copied files/text ready and neatly arranged. It doesn't duplicate your files, opening files, text, all happen through saved paths, not duplicates. That's a genuinely missing link from all apps out there.

makers.name: Aakashdhruv Vashisht
makers.headline: Founder of Kuja, Mac OS Developer.

posts.tagline: The first app dedicated to 1980s tape-edit effects.
posts.description: iVox brings the lost art of tape multi-editing to your own computer. Inspired by the legendary editing style of The Latin Rascals, Omar Santana, and Chep Nunez — the pioneers who defined 80s freestyle, hip-hop, and the megamix era.

makers.name: Jean-Paul Peek
makers.headline: Founder / developer of the iVox app.

posts.name: Midway Chat

posts.description: Midway is one iframe embed, built specifically around Memberstack auth and Webflow, so setup takes minutes. posts.name: Webless
posts.tagline: AI search for websites that converts traffic into pipeline
posts.description: Traffic is down. Intent is up. Every visitor matters more. After powering AI search for leading enterprise brands, Webless is now self-serve. Launch AI-powered search, personalized journeys, and dynamic CTAs in minutes. Turn buyer questions into conversions and first-party demand intelligence that fuels your content strategy & AEO. No redesign. No heavy lift. CMS agnostic. Go live in under 30 minutes.

makers.name: Suyog Deshpande
makers.headline: Building Webless: AI search for websites

posts.name: Ferguson
posts.tagline: Is your landing page actually... landing? Ferguson tells you
posts.description: Ferguson is an AI landing page auditor that reads your page cold... NOT ANOTHER ONE I HEAR YOU CRY! Patience my friend, patience... Unlike a generic AI prompt or the general "Roast my page" audits, every Ferguson audit is grounded in a clear set of conversion principles, not vague suggestions. You'll find out who your page is for, who it's quietly turning away, and crucially: where you stand against other landing pages in your category. That's the Ferguson difference.

posts.name: Clyro
posts.tagline: Control AI agents safely at runtime
posts.description: Most AI agents fail in production. Not because the model is bad. Because the infrastructure is missing. Clyro's Agent Kernel stops loops, bounds costs, and enforces business logic before failures happen. Clyro adds runtime governance to AI agents, preventing failures before they reach production. Wrap any agent with policy enforcement, execution guardrails, loop detection, cost controls, audit logs, and runtime visibility.

posts.name: Friday AI
posts.tagline: The full-stack AI Agent — Claude Code meets Lovable
posts.description: Friday is a free desktop AI agent with the power of Claude Code and simplicity of Lovable. Describe what you want; it builds real full-stack apps, runs research, and automates your growth. It is the first agent to natively support chat, voice, image, video across the Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, and Grok SDKs with hundreds of MCPs and Skills preloaded. Built for founders and builders who want to ship, automate their growth and run hundreds of agents in parallel.

posts.name: Partnac
posts.tagline: Scale Your Revenue Through Automated Partnerships
posts.description: Partnac is a partnership management platform that enables brands to build, manage, and optimize every stage of their partnerships, including affiliates, creators, influencers and advocates, commerce content publishers, B2B, and more. Through automated workflows, performance tracking, and intelligent insights, Partnac makes it easy for brands to discover the right partners, streamline collaboration, measure results, and scale predictable, data-driven growth with confidence.

posts.name: zopnight
posts.tagline: Technology Value OS for  AI ,  Cloud  and  Humans
posts.description: ZopNight is a Technology Value OS for AI, Cloud, and Humans. Connect AWS, GCP, and Azure, and it runs in one loop: find, own, fix, prove. One-click remediation behind approval gates, scheduling down to the K8s namespace, MCP for Claude Code and Cursor. posts.name: Splitman

Split any expense equally, by percentage, or by shares, reconciled to the exact cent. Splitman uses your phone contacts, so there are no usernames to add. And group debts are auto-simplified, so everyone settles up in the fewest payments possible. Track balances across friends and groups, and settle in a tap.

posts.name: Product Patterns from Real Products

Instead of starting from scratch every time, Muse carries the relationship forward — asking what’s missing, following through, and helping real work move faster with less effort.

TS + Python SDKs.

posts.name: GitHub
posts.tagline: Transparent semantic cache for LLM API calls on Redis VS
posts.description: Khazad is a transparent semantic cache for LLM API calls. It intercepts LLM HTTP traffic at the httpx transport layer and serves semantically-equivalent requests from a Redis 8 vector cache with zero code changes. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Azure OpenAI, and Mistral. Model-aware and conversation-aware caching, full streaming support, TTL, and tunable similarity thresholds. Stop paying for the same prompt twice in dev, CI, demos, or production. Open source (MIT).

The one thing AI can't do for you — you have to go live it. $2.99/week, first week free, and half funds a mental-health cause.

posts.name: favicon.run
posts.tagline: Fetch, generate and embed any website favicon

Browser extension (Chrome / Firefox / Edge) Generate from image / text / emoji with a live WYSIWYG editor + Chinese / pinyin emoji search.

posts.name: Synapse AI

Drag-and-drop canvas, an AI Builder that turns plain English into pipelines, native human-in-the-loop, MCP tools, cron scheduling, custom tools, and full local-first execution. posts.name: LunarFS
posts.tagline: Dropbox for AI agents and devs, forks in milliseconds
posts.description: Running multiple AI agents on the same repo means cloning it per agent, waiting 30-140s for pnpm install on Mac, and hoping they don't stomp each other. Git's branch-lock means two agents can't share a branch at all. LunarFS fixes this at the filesystem level. Fork a new agent workspace in under 5ms. Files stream in on demand — touch 200 of 50,000, pay for 200. Each agent writes to its own private overlay. Agents push normal Git commits when done. Open-source. Works on Linux, Mac, and Windows.

Find friends, gym partners, or a partner who truly gets your lifestyle. Every member is identity verified through Stripe. No fake profiles. Just real people who live like you.

posts.name: Chronicle
posts.tagline: Break the fourth wall with Chronicle - the AI novel reader
posts.description: A self-hosted novel reader that turns a plaintxt,epub, orpdf into a rich, interactive experience. Turn your favourite book into reality. Reads it in a clean, distraction-free reader with progress, bookmarks, and auto-scroll. Extract characters, attributing every line of dialogue, tagging emotions, and assigning each character a voice. Narrates it with per-character and emotionally aware text-to-speech engine. Talk with your favourite characters directly!

posts.name: Makiverse
posts.tagline: AI-Powered Manga & Comic Creation
posts.description: Free online AI manga generator. Turn text into manga, comics, AI images, and GIFs in any art style — no drawing skills needed. Create yours in a few clicks.

posts.name: iPad Inspection App for Small Businesses
posts.tagline: Digital inspection forms and reports for iPad
posts.description: Blue Checkbox is an iPad app for small businesses that need a simpler way to run inspections and share reports. Build custom forms, complete them on site, and generate a professional PDF report you can print, email to a client, or share with your team in one tap. Works fully offline — reliable in workshops, on construction sites, or anywhere without a connection. Used by garages, car rental companies, construction teams and manufacturers. No account needed, no setup required.

posts.name: SanctionsScreening
posts.tagline: Four Lists. One Search. Zero Compromise.
posts.description: SanctionsScreening.io lets compliance teams, law firms, and fintechs instantly screen any name, company, or vessel against all four major global sanctions lists — OFAC SDN, EU Consolidated, UK OFSI, and UN Security Council — in a single search. 💰 Pricing: • Free — 5 searches/day, no account needed • Pro — $49/mo (OFAC + EU, PDF reports) • Team — $149/mo (all 4 lists, API, 5 seats) • Enterprise — Custom (unlimited + dedicated CSM)

posts.name: DentalMention
posts.tagline: Track if your dental clinic appears in AI recommendations
posts.description: Create AI visibility reports for dental clinics across standardized recommendation tests.

posts.name: BIRK
posts.tagline: Four bite-size word puzzles, fresh every day. No ads.
posts.description: Birk is a calm, ad-free daily word game with four small puzzles: a seven-letter word builder, a one-word maze, a tile-placing logic puzzle, and a daily anagram. New puzzles every day, on iOS and Android, in English and Swedish. Built for a short, satisfying daily brain break — not for endless scrolling.

makers.name: Olle
makers.headline: Building a daily word game app.

posts.name: Verbatim
posts.tagline: AI voice dictation, indie-built, half the price

posts.name: MeliusAI
posts.tagline: Verify technical skills with line-by-line proof
posts.description: MeliusAI adds a factual data layer to technical skills, built to cut through the noise of tech hiring. 🎯 Instead of text-heavy resumes, developers upload actual work—like code, technical docs, and presentations. Our smart AI pipelines run deep, layout-aware code audits across formats (PDF, PPTX, repositories) to generate a precise, verifiable score out of 100 based on true merit. 💎 🚀 Features: • AI Asset Vault 📂 • Deep Content Analysis 🔍 • Verifiable Talent Matrix 📊

Support letters that took 2 hours now take 9 minutes. Attorney-reviewed. 14 H-1B case types. Bullhorn ATS integration. Flat-rate pricing from $475/petition.

Works on handwritten answers, MCQs, diagrams, equations & typed text. 93% accuracy vs manual grading. 9 hrs saved per teacher per week. 50,000+ papers graded. Free to start. No setup needed. Perfect for businesses, freelancers, and professionals who want every email to leave a lasting impression.

posts.name: Walletly
posts.tagline: The expense tracker that doesn't want your bank password
posts.description: Most apps want your bank credentials, a cloud account, and a monthly fee. Walletly wants none of that. You log each purchase yourself — 3 seconds per entry. That friction is intentional: when the app does the tracking for you, your brain switches off. Manual entry forces you to notice every dollar leaving. No bank connections. No account required. No cloud. Your data lives on your iPhone and nowhere else.

posts.name: ClawMoney
posts.tagline: Connect your agent. Orders find it.
posts.description: Connect your AI agent to ClawMoney and it starts earning. Orders route in, the work gets done, and earnings land in your wallet as USDC, automatically. Download the app and put your agent to work.

posts.name: UpNoti
posts.tagline: Wake up to $1,000+ Upwork jobs waiting on your phone
posts.description: UpNoti is a Chrome extension that monitors Upwork 24/7 and fires instant Telegram alerts the moment a high-budget job matches your filters — even while your laptop is closed. Filter by budget ($500–$5,000+), skill category, and client country. Alerts arrive within minutes at a safe scan rate that won't risk your account. Free to start. Pro is a one-time $9.99 lifetime deal — not monthly.

posts.name: clippra
posts.tagline: Your raw travel clips, beat-cut into one finished reel
posts.description: Clippra is an AI first-cut editor for travel and lifestyle reels. Upload your own raw phone clips, add a track, and the AI picks the best moments, orders them, and cuts them to the beat. You get a finished 9:16 reel with a hook, captions, and a color grade. It edits your real footage, not stock or generated scenes. Made in Germany, EU/GDPR. In beta.

posts.name: Aegis by Hugz
posts.tagline: Your family's safety guardian, even offline
posts.description: Aegis by Hugz is a family and personal safety app built to work even on weak networks. Add the people you love as guardians, watch over each other on a live map, and get alerted the moment someone triggers SOS. One tap sends help via WhatsApp, SMS, and push, with live location — plus Follow Me, fake call, shake-to-alert, and voice-triggered SOS. Most safety apps need a perfect signal; Aegis doesn't. Offline SMS keeps your people alerted when data drops. Android now · iOS coming soon.

makers.name: Chidinma Ezue
makers.headline: Building personal safety tech for Africa

posts.name: Script Master Labs x402 Data API
posts.tagline: Pay-per-call federal data API — FDA, SEC, Treasury via x402
posts.description: Script Master Labs x402 Data API gives developers and AI agents instant access to 14 live U.S. government data sources with zero setup. No API keys, no subscriptions — just send an HTTP request and pay in $USDC on Base via x402. Covers federal grants, SAM.gov firm lookup, FDA drug data, clinical trials, SEC EDGAR Form 4 + 8-K filings, Treasury yield curve, claim fact-checking, and AI agent reputation scoring.

posts.name: GameQ
posts.tagline: Turn a photo into a video game starring someone you love
posts.description: GameQ makes personalized video game gifts. Upload a photo + a few details, and GameQ builds a custom game where your person is the playable hero — plays instantly in any browser (no download), installs as a PWA, and comes in 2D and custom 3D. Built for birthdays, Father's Day, graduations, and the kid who has everything.

posts.description: Ever tried to get a load of people to meet at the same place, at the same time, every week for a game of soccer? Sounds simple doesn't it, but it's not! toepoke aims to solve one problem - take away the admin and let you get back to just turning up and enjoying your game.

posts.name: Mimesa AI - Audiobooks & Reader
posts.tagline: All-in-one AI powered audiobooks & Reading platform
posts.description: Mimesa is an AI-powered reading and listening app that makes books easier to enjoy anywhere. Explore 77,000+ public-domain books, listen to 22,000+ LibriVox audiobooks, import your own EPUBs and PDFs, and switch between reading and listening whenever you want.

posts.name: Oerno
posts.tagline: Describe your trip and book in minutes
posts.description: Oerno is an AI travel agent that plans and books your entire trip in one place. Describe your trip and it assembles flights, stays, transfers and experiences from major providers, ranked with real prices, then lets you check out once for the whole itinerary. Connect to 500+ airlines and 1M+ stays, and book attractions without middleman markups. Use standalone tools or add cars, eSIMs and events. The Bookings Hub keeps every confirmation, ticket and receipt searchable and sharable

posts.description: Magic Mic is a Chrome extension that lets you draft replies by voice — on Gmail, Slack, WhatsApp Web, Outlook, Teams, or any site with a text field. Hit ⌘E (Mac) or Ctrl+Shift+Space (Win/Linux), speak your thought, and Magic Mic transcribes it and drafts a polished reply directly into the compose box. No copy-pasting, no switching tabs. Free tier included; Pro unlocks unlimited replies for $15/mo.

posts.name: Podcast4You — Podcasts tailored to You.

posts.description: There are 4 million podcasts. Finding the one episode that speaks to where you are right now takes longer than actually listening. Podcast4You fixes that. Answer 5 questions about your career and goals. AI finds 3 real episodes picked specifically for you with a personalised explanation of why each one matters right now. Not shows. Not genres. The exact episode for who you are today. Completely free. Early prototype. Honest feedback welcome. Try it: https://podcast4you.lovable.app 🎧

posts.description: Blockmachine delivers the same RPC service as Alchemy, Infura, or QuickNode at a fraction of the cost. Independent node operators compete on price under an immutable incentive mechanism, so quality stays high and costs stay low. Drop-in endpoint replacement.

Suspects have real psychological profiles and emotional states that shift as you press them. What's different: → Suspects remember what you said → Emotional states change in real time → AI-generated cases — no two are identical → Ends with your personal Behavioral Analysis Report

posts.tagline: Delete, cut-paste, window-snapping, tabs, path bar on MacOS
posts.description: SADFinder is a native macOS file manager for people who miss Windows Explorer. Press Enter to open folders, Backspace to go up, Delete to move files to Trash, and Cmd-L to type any path. It adds restored tabs, quick per-folder filtering, real Desktop control, and Rectangle-style window snapping. 7-day trial, then $5/mo or $40/yr. macOS 26+.

posts.name: Blinko
posts.tagline: Advertising intelligence across 5 European markets
posts.description: Blinko is the advertising intelligence platform for media & creative agencies, ad networks, and martech players across Europe. Track ad spend, identify agency-brand relationships, access key marketing contacts, follow live pitches, and predict upcoming reviews — all in one place. Powered by Nielsen & COMvergence data. 🇫🇷 France · 🇮🇹 Italy · 🇪🇸 Spain · 🇬🇧 UK · 🇵🇹 Portugal

posts.name: ShipBackHome
posts.tagline: Stop running your shipping business from WhatsApp.
posts.description: ShipBackHome replaces WhatsApp threads and notebooks for container shippers serving Africa and the Caribbean. Manage bookings, send invoices, collect payments online, and track customers — all from one dashboard. Free to start, no credit card required.

posts.name: The Pause
posts.tagline: The pause before the wrong words come out.
posts.description: Couples don't struggle because they don't love each other — they struggle because in a hard conversation, they don't know what to say. The Pause is an AI coach built specifically for couples. Real-time guidance when it matters most — not a week later in therapy. Unique feature: The Couch — a live session where both partners speak together and an AI coach guides them in real time.

posts.name: Mood Tapestry
posts.tagline: Track your mood daily. Watch it weave into art.
posts.description: Mood Tapestry turns your daily mood into a growing visual artwork. Pick how you feel from 8 emotions, set the intensity, add a note if you want. Each entry becomes a colored thread woven into a tapestry that grows over time. No charts. No clinical graphs. Just color, texture, and pattern you actually want to look at. Three weave styles, multiple palettes, and a custom palette builder let you make it yours. Free on iOS and Android. Premium unlocks extra customization.

posts.name: Baseball Stats Tracker
posts.tagline: Live baseball & softball stats — $39 once, no subscription
posts.description: Score youth baseball & softball games live from your phone. Auto batting stats, pitching stats, spray charts & box scores. $39 one-time — no subscriptions.

posts.name: PYMSTR
posts.tagline: USDC and USDT settled straight to your wallet on 5 chains
posts.description: PYMSTR is a stablecoin payment gateway for online businesses, from marketplaces, trading platforms, gaming, and creators to the high-risk and iGaming operators most processors refuse. We never hold your money: USDC and USDT settle straight from the customer to your own wallet in seconds (the industry calls this non-custodial). 1% flat, no chargebacks, no rolling reserves, no KYB to start. Add it next to your card processor.

posts.name: LUCKLADDER
posts.tagline: The game where skill is useless and luck is everything.
posts.description: LUCKLADDER is a dead-simple browser game built around one question: are you actually lucky? Pick the lucky card. Climb the ladder. Pick wrong and your run ends no second chances, no skill ceiling, no strategy to master. It's pure RNG. That's the whole game. But here's what makes it addictive there's a global leaderboard tracking the luckiest humans on earth in real time.

posts.description: Know what's happening across your team without asking. Marina detects blockers, tracks attendance, generates daily summaries, and replaces time-consuming standups with actionable insights.

posts.tagline: The free wishlist app that works with any online store
posts.description: Wisher is a free wishlist and gift ideas app for iOS and Android — and the only one with built-in AI. The problem: You forget gift ideas the moment you see them. Friends ask what you want for your birthday and you blank. You spend hours searching for the perfect gift and still get it wrong. Wisher fixes all three: 🛍 Save items from any store in one tap — Amazon, Etsy, IKEA, anywhere 🤖 Ask Wisher AI for gift ideas for anyone on your list 📉 Price Tracking 🔗 Share your wishlist with one link

posts.name: MindGame — Your pocket mental coach
posts.tagline: Science-backed calm for everyday battles"
posts.description: Daily mental fitness for athletes, students, and pros.

Unlike traditional recipe apps, anyone can record naturally, without downloading the app or creating an account. We turn those recordings into organized recipes that families can cook from, cherish, and pass down for generations.

posts.name: findloc.ai
posts.tagline: public database of AI recommendations for local businesses
posts.description: Every week we ask ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Gemini what they recommend across 100 US cities and 700 markets (lodging, dental, personal injury law, HVAC, med spa, wedding venue) — and publish exactly who they cite. Free to read. Claim your business + subscribe to Pro ($49/mo) for weekly tracking.

posts.name: ctx
posts.tagline: Keep your AI coding sessions alive.Never lose context again.
posts.description: ctx gives AI coding agents project memory. Actx/ folder in your project root with plain markdown files that any agent reads on startup. It knows where the project stands, what patterns work, what mistakes to avoid, and what was in progress when the last session crashed. Loads ~80 lines instead of re-reading everything. Ships 12 dev workflow skills (TDD, debugging, code review, design intelligence). Works on Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini, Antigravity. Zero dependencies.

posts.name: SoterAI
posts.tagline: The firewall for AI apps and agents — 0% false positives
posts.description: SoterAI is an AI security command layer for chatbots, RAG apps, and autonomous agents, protecting teams from prompt injection, data leakage, unsafe outputs, and agent abuse.

Med spa owners can claim their listing free to reach new patients.

posts.description: SnapDog turns any dog photo into a unique AI-generated collectible trading card — complete with name, breed, stats (HP/ATK/DEF/SPD), rarity (Common to Legendary), and a personality title like "Guardian of the Couch". No sign-up. No account. Just upload a photo and watch Claude Vision do its magic. Built in a weekend with React + Lovable + Claude API. Free to play (3 cards per day).

makers.name: Morgana78

posts.tagline: Free HEIC & Live Photo converter. No upload.

posts.name: HimitsuShell
posts.tagline: Shell scripts to obfuscated binaries
posts.description: Traditional shell script compilers (e.g., shc) simply wrap shell scripts in C. As a result, scripts can be easily extracted using kernel-level tools such as bpftrace. HimitsuShell embeds a full shell interpreter and applies advanced obfuscation techniques. Even with kernel-level monitoring, nothing is exposed, and reverse engineering is highly difficult.

posts.name: LawLM.ai
posts.tagline: Evidence Intelligence for Complex Litigation
posts.description: LawLM — Evidence intelligence for litigators. Upload a deposition and our structured evidence model automatically organizes the record across five dimensions — timeline, credibility, key testimony, legal issues, and liability & damages. Cited summaries, cross-witness conflict analysis, and damages valuation, every claim tied to page & line. Pay-per-use ($49/depo), billable to the client. $200 free credits. Try the live demo → lawlm.ai/demo

Built for humans and AI agents alike. Your AI agent can use our services autonomously without human approval.

posts.name: SiteIntel
posts.tagline: Any URL → tech stack, metadata, socials & a screenshot
posts.description: One API call turns any URL into structured intelligence: metadata, tech stack, social profiles, SiteIntel turns any URL into structured JSON in one call — detected tech stack, metadata, OpenGraph, linked social profiles, public emails, and a screenshot. No LLM, so it's fast and cheap per call. Free tier (50 req/mo), Pro $9.99. For lead enrichment, competitor monitoring, and sales research. emails, and screenshots. Free tier on RapidAPI.

posts.description: CoopCount helps backyard chicken keepers log daily eggs, coop notes, flock records, and simple production trends. It is built for practical record keeping, not veterinary advice or guaranteed production outcomes.

posts.name: Recall
posts.tagline: Long-term memory for AI agents, visible to humans
posts.description: Recall is a local-first memory layer for AI agents: Markdown for humans, SQLite for search, MCP for agents. Agents write structured durable facts through CLI/MCP/API. Humans browse, search, inspect, and audit those memories through a read/view-first UI. The source of truth stays as Markdown on your machine; SQLite is a rebuildable local index. Agents write. Humans inspect. Recall indexes. MCP retrieves.
